title: Estratègia nacional de ciberseguretat del Principat d'Andorra 2024-2027
description: National Cybersecurity Strategy 2024-2027 published by Andorra's national cybersecurity agency (ANC-AD). References emerging technologies (AI, blockchain, cloud) but, per WebFetch of the page, does NOT explicitly mention post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography or PQC. Domestic institutional issuer but fails the explicit-PQC threshold.

title: Sobre nosaltres / Què és l'ANC-AD? - Agència Nacional de Ciberseguretat d'Andorra
description: About page of ANC-AD, Andorra's national cybersecurity authority and CSIRT (CSIRT-AD). Domestic institutional issuer but no PQC/post-quantum content.

title: Agència Nacional de Ciberseguretat - Govern d'Andorra
description: Government of Andorra page describing the National Cybersecurity Agency under the Ministry of Public Function and Digital Transformation. Domestic institutional, but no explicit PQC/post-quantum content.

title: Quatre perspectives que marcaran l'agenda de ciberseguretat industrial el 2023 - ANC-AD
description: ANC-AD blog/news item on industrial cybersecurity trends for 2023. Domestic institutional issuer but no explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography reference.

title: La computació quàntica trencarà Internet... o no? - CaixaBank
description: Catalan-language commentary on quantum computing and cryptography by CaixaBank (Spanish bank, not Andorran/domestic). Excluded as foreign vendor/bank corporate content.

title: Seguretat postquàntica: estem preparats per sobreviure a l'atac dels ordinadors del futur? - EbreDigital.cat
description: Catalan-language journalism on post-quantum security. Not Andorran government; journalism. Excluded.

title: Andorra, el primer territori del país amb criptomoneda pròpia? - VilaWeb
description: Journalism about Andorra's proposed sovereign digital currency (AFA). No post-quantum cryptography reference; journalism, not domestic institutional. Excluded.
